---
title: "Hossein's Notes"
description: "I'm Hossein Oliabak, a telecom network architect with expertise in data center and service provider technologies. Currently pursuing my Master's degree..."
show-reading-time: false
---
# Welcome

A collection of notes and courses on mathematics, machine learning, deep learning, agentic AI, and network engineering — written as both a personal reference and a resource for anyone learning alongside.

## What You Find Here

- **Mathematics**: Linear algebra, calculus, and probability theory for network analysis
- **Machine Learning**: Supervised learning and advanced learning algorithms, including neural networks and multiclass classification
- **Deep Learning**: Neural network architectures and training techniques
- **Agentic AI**: Agent architecture, frameworks, and asynchronous I/O for building autonomous systems
- **Network Engineering**: CCIE-level documentation and real-world implementations
- **Research**: Graduate-level work on network optimization and machine learning
- **Code and Tools**: Scripts and utilities for network automation

## Continue Where You Left Off

<div id="continue-reading-section"></div>
